<!-- GENERATED by /dev docs export - do not hand-edit -->
# Eclipse Dev Commands

Operator reference for `/dev` and legacy admin roots. Regenerate with `/dev docs export`.

## Analytics

- `/dev anticheat player <player>` — Show one player's valuable-ore exposure score. · perm **2**
- `/dev anticheat status` — Show behavioral anti-xray configuration and current suspicion counts. · perm **2**
- `/dev anticheat threshold` — Show the active soft and hard suspicion thresholds. · perm **2**
- `/dev anticheat threshold hard <score>` — Persist a new behavioral anti-xray threshold and clear old samples. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/dev anticheat threshold soft <score>` — Persist a new behavioral anti-xray threshold and clear old samples. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/dev stats query <player> [metric] [day]` — Query one player's analytics for a metric/day or list all non-zero metrics. · perm **2**
- `/dev stats top <metric>` — Show the current-day top ten for an analytics metric. · perm **2**

## Buffs

- `/dev buff clear` — Stop every active timed buff. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev buff give <buff> [duration] [target]` — Start or extend a global timed buff; the optional target must be @a. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev buff list` — List active buffs, remaining time, and magnitude. · perm **2**

## Config & handbook

- `/dev` — Open Dev Handbook (or chat fallback) · perm **2**
- `/dev docs export` — Generate docs/DEV_COMMANDS.md · perm **2**
- `/dev help` — Paginated command listing in chat · perm **2**
- `/dev reload` — Hot-reload all configs and re-sync clients · perm **2** · *caution*

## Cutscene

- `/dev replay list` — Lists replayable FX-only sequence ids and phases registered by the cutscene engine. · perm **2**
- `/dev replay play <id> [<phase>]` — Replays one registered sequence phase for the operator (console: all players), without terrain or progression changes. · perm **2**
- `/dev replay revert <id>` — Explains why an FX-only replay has no persistent state to revert. · perm **2**
- `/eclipsefx caption` — Show a cinematic caption on your client in the given style (subtitle, title or whisper). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx cutscene play` — Play a cutscene for ALL players: global teleport gather, view-distance bump, return after. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/eclipsefx cutscene preview` — Trace a cutscene flight path with particles (arc-length spaced; no camera takeover). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx cutscene stop` — Abort every active cutscene session (unfreeze + return gathered players). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx emitter` — Spawn a Quasar emitter on your client, at your feet or at the given position. · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx post` — Force an Eclipse Veil post pipeline on/off on your client, or list live pipelines. · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx rift` — Open a rift tear FX at a position with the given width; 'rift close' closes your last one. · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx sequence` — Replay one phase of a scripted sequence in FX-only mode (no world/state changes). · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/eclipsefx storm` — Spawn/dissipate a dev storm wall or vortex at your position, or fire a lightning bolt where you look. · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx sun debug` — Toggle the sun-debug HUD cross at the CPU-projected sun point (compare against the disc). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx supplybeam test` — Toggle a test supply-beam marker at your position (add on first run, remove on second). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx uniform` — Override one float uniform of a Veil post pipeline on your client (debug knob). · perm **3**
- `/eclipsefx viewdist` — Push a cinematic view distance to your client, or reset the server+client bump. · perm **3** · *caution*

## Display

- `/dev display clear` — Deletes every tracked display entity, including entities in currently unloaded chunks. · perm **3** · *destructive*
- `/dev display give` — Gives the op-only Display Wand. Hold a block in the off hand; right-click to place/select, sneak-right-click to delete. Axiom is unavailable for NeoForge 1.21.1. · perm **2**
- `/dev display list` — Lists every persisted vanilla block display and its animation parameters. · perm **2**
- `/dev display param <id> <axis|speed|bob|period|scale|glow|pos|delete> …` — Edits one display's rotation axis/speed, bob, scale, glow or position, or deletes it. · perm **2** · *caution*

## Mods

- `/dev modcheck` — Reports loaded mods against the allowlist, namespace/id gate state, and nested bundles. · perm **2**
- `/dev modcheck mode <allowlist|blocklist>` — Switches connection screening between strict allowlist and legacy blocklist mode. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/dev modcheck snapshot` — Replaces the allowlist with the running server's real mod set; preserves optional client mods. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/dev modcheck test <player>` — Dry-runs the current allowlist against an online player's last mod report. · perm **2**

## Music

- `/dev credits` — Open the in-game Eclipse credits screen. · perm **2**
- `/dev music list` — List all registered Eclipse music cue ids. · perm **2**
- `/dev music play <id>` — Play one Eclipse music cue on your client. · perm **2**
- `/dev music stop` — Fade out Eclipse music on your client. · perm **2**

## Players

- `/dev player multiplier clear <player>` — Reset a player's hidden skill-XP multiplier to 1. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev player multiplier set <player> <factor>` — Set a player's hidden persisted skill-XP multiplier. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev player multiplier show <player>` — Show a player's hidden skill-XP multiplier to the issuing operator. · perm **2**
- `/dev player xp give <player> <amount>` — Grant skill XP through the normal multiplier and cap pipeline. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev viewdist pin <player|@a> <chunks>` — Persistently request a client render-distance pin for selected players. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev viewdist status [player|@a]` — Show persistent pins, server distance, and transient override state. · perm **2**
- `/dev viewdist unpin <player|@a>` — Remove selected players' persistent render-distance pins. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev voice mute global (on|off)` — Enable or disable the server-wide voice mute. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev voice mute player <player> (on|off)` — Enable or disable a persistent per-player voice mute. · perm **2** · *caution*

## Quests

- `/dev quest complete <player> <questId>` — Complete any current main, side, or personal quest by id. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev quest list <player>` — List a player's quests with clickable ids and progress. · perm **2**
- `/dev quest reroll <player>` — Reroll a player's personal quest set. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev quest revoke <player> <questId>` — Revoke any current main, side, or personal quest by id. · perm **2** · *caution*

## Spawn

- `/dev spawn radius <blocks>` — Overrides both saved spawn-protection geometries; without an override gameplay defaults to r=96 and sanctum build protection to r=18. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev spawn set <x> <y> <z>` — Moves the shared spawn and the center used by both spawn-protection geometries. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev spawn show [on|off]` — Shows both protection radii and draws/toggles an op-only particle preview. · perm **2**

## Stage

- `/dev stage backup now [<label>]` — Captures a timestamped live-terrain backup immediately, with an optional label. · perm **3**
- `/dev stage list` — Lists curated snapshots and live backups with clickable restore links and UTC timestamps. · perm **3**
- `/dev stage load <name>` — Restores a curated snapshot or timestamped live backup; first backs up the current terrain. · perm **3** · *destructive*
- `/dev stage prune [<keep>]` — Keeps the newest N live backups per dimension and removes older ones. · perm **3** · *caution*
- `/dev stage revert` — Restores the newest pre-operation terrain backup. The revert is itself revertible. · perm **3** · *destructive*
- `/dev stage save <name>` — Saves a named live-terrain snapshot of the current stage annulus. · perm **3** · *caution*

## Timer

- `/dev timer add <duration>` — Move the next day boundary later by a duration. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev timer pause` — Pause the real-time day countdown. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev timer resume` — Resume the paused real-time day countdown. · perm **2**
- `/dev timer set <time>` — Set the next boundary by wall time, date-time, or relative duration. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev timer status` — Show detailed zone-aware real-time day clock status. · perm **2**
- `/dev timer sub <duration>` — Move the next day boundary earlier by a duration. · perm **2** · *caution*

## Xbox event

- `/dev xboxevent lockout clear (<player>|all)` — Clears event lockouts for one player or all players in the current instance. · perm **2**
- `/dev xboxevent lockout mode (voluntary|death|both)` — Selects which exits lock re-entry for this instance: voluntary, death, or both. · perm **2**
- `/dev xboxevent portal (here|remove)` — Portal maintenance: 'here' re-places it at your position, 'remove' despawns it. · perm **2**
- `/dev xboxevent reset <world>` — Stages a world reset: the dimension is deleted and re-extracted from the bundled zip at next boot. · perm **3** · *destructive*
- `/dev xboxevent reward set <buffId> <minutes>` — Overrides the participation reward buff/minutes for the current instance only. · perm **2**
- `/dev xboxevent start (tu1|tu12|tu14) [<minutes>]` — Opens the Xbox event: installs a portal near spawn, announces it, starts the timer (default 30 min). · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev xboxevent status` — Shows phase, world, remaining time, participants, lockouts, portal, reward, installed worlds. · perm **2**
- `/dev xboxevent stop [now]` — Ends the event: 'now' returns everyone immediately, otherwise a 10 s grace window. · perm **2** · *caution*
- `/dev xboxevent time (add|sub|set) <duration>` — Adjusts the running timer: set <dur>, add <dur>, reduce <dur> (e.g. 10m, 90s, 1h10m). · perm **2**
- `/xboxleave` — Player command (perm 0): voluntarily leave the Xbox world with confirmation; inventory kept, lockout until next event. · perm **0**

Permission level **3** unless noted. Prefer polished `/dev` equivalents when available.

## Dev blocks & items

- **Display Wand** — `/dev display give` (P5-W6). Vanilla `block_display` placer; Axiom is not available for NeoForge 1.21.1; wand + commands are the supported editor.
